questionHtml: Compare and contrast, the variation with time of the temperature of the cosmic background (CMB) radiation, for the two models from the present time onward.
markschemeHtml:
«since T ∝ 1 R » the temperature drops for both models ✔

but in the accelerating model R increases faster and so the temperature drops faster ✔

meta.title: Compare and contrast, the variation with time of the temperature of the cosmic background (CMB) radiation, for the two models from the present time onward.
